CustomField.description: Stable identifier for the column (e.g. product, quantity, unitPrice).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the column key. Valid values: product, unitOfMeasure, quantity, unitPrice, discount, totalSalesPrice, type, startDate, endDate, additionalInfo, editableUnitListPriceUSD, editableCostPriceUSD, sen, userCount, unusualDiscountReviewed, lossReviewed
CustomField.label: Column Key
